name: Talked to insurance adjuster already after injury in Farmington Utah, did I mess up?

mainEntity.name: Talked to insurance adjuster already after injury in Farmington Utah, did I mess up?

acceptedAnswer.text: Maybe; lawyer takes over communications now.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: Possibly, if admitted fault or minimized injuries; statements used against you. Record exists forever.[1] Key factors: common tactics to lowball, no legal duty to chat. Stop contact via lawyer, correct record if needed; proceed carefully. Attorney handles future talks.
